mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM pa_mst_customer
company_id = #{companyId}
AND ( LOWER(customer_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(customer_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(mobile_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(phone_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(vat_registration_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(trade_license_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(cr_number) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') )
ORDER BY customer_name ASC LIMIT 25
